name: MD Camp
description:
A port of my bot from Character AI

It's not really episode 4, it's an alternate universe based on it, since there's Doll here and V and N are already on the bus.

I did my best to minimize situations where the bot speaks for you. It still happens, but less. There's nothing I can do about it.

If the messages are too big or weird, I recommend playing around with the generation settings.

This is my first experience in creating bots on Janitor AI, so don't judge harshly :P
creator: IamJake2376
